modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues logging into Accommodate for faculty members.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to log into Accommodate, but I am having trouble. As a faculty member, I want to know what options I have in the platform. I need help understanding how to use Accommodate effectively.
short_description: Issues logging into Accommodate for faculty members.
description: I am trying to log into Accommodate, but I am having trouble. As a faculty member, I want to know what options I have in the platform. I need help understanding how to use Accommodate effectively.
